name: Forbid Committing CMake Artifacts
description: The repository must not contain CMakeFiles/ or CMakeCache.txt.
reason:
题目要求（README.md 632-639 行）：**IMPORTANT**: You must create a `.gitignore` file in your project root directory to avoid OJ evaluation conflicts. The `.gitignore` file should include at least the following entries:

```gitignore
CMakeFiles/
CMakeCache.txt
```

name: Ensure CMakeLists Outputs code Executable
description: Provide a CMakeLists.txt that produces an executable named code.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 626 行）：After this process is complete, we will use the `code` file in the project root directory as the compilation result.

name: Restrict External Dependencies and STL Containers
description: Disallow external libraries, STL containers except std::string, and prohibit including <algorithm>.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 33 行和 648-650 行）：This assignment does not allow the use of external libraries, STL containers (except `std::string`), or the `algorithm` library. Cannot use external libraries, Cannot use STL containers (except `std::string`), Cannot use `algorithm` library.

name: Overall Project Readability and Organization Structure
description: Assess overall project readability, code organization, and structure clarity.
